name: SCANDIUM INTERNATIONAL MINING CORP.
business: Scandium International Mining Corp is a mineral exploration and development company focused on scandium. Its most advanced project is the Nyngan Scandium Project in Australia, on which it holds a mine lease, development consent, and 100% mineral rights. The company plans to produce scandium oxide and scandium-content products for applications in high-strength aluminum alloys, solid oxide fuel cells, electronics, and aerospace.

exposures.sentence: Our corporate focus is the development of projects that enable the production and sale of scandium and scandium-based products.
In Europe and the U.S., scandium-containing alloys have been evaluated for use in structural parts in commercial airplanes and high stress parts in automobile engines and brake systems.
Military and aerospace applications are known to be of interest, although with less specificity.
We are a mineral exploration and development company that is at an exploration stage.
Scandium is typically produced and sold as a powder, in oxide form, and known as scandium oxide, scandia or Sc2O3.

catalysts.event: Physical development commenced at Nyngan Scandium Project
catalysts.sentence: In November 2023 we commenced physical development of the Nyngan Scandium Project following the results of the 2023 Nyngan drilling program which better defined the western boundary of the existing resource.

catalysts.event: Completed drilling program at Honeybugle Scandium Project
catalysts.sentence: In the first quarter of 2023, we completed a drilling program at the Honeybugle Scandium Project which discovered a new Scandium enriched laterite formation approx. 2 meters below the surface area at the Woodlong prospect within the Honeybugle Exploration License 7977 area.

tamClaims.claim: Global annual production of scandium is estimated between 15 and 20 tonnes
tamClaims.sentence: Global annual production estimates of scandium range from 15 tonnes to 20 tonnes, but accurate statistics are not available due to the lack of public information from countries in which scandium is currently being produced, specifically China and Russia.

tamClaims.claim: Global sales of scandium oxide are estimated between 15 and 25 tonnes per year
tamClaims.sentence: They also estimate the global sales of scandium oxide to be between 15-25 tpy, principally from China, Russia and the Philippines.
